steps.title: Use the example after the clause
steps.content: The clause many are still well known is complete. The following clause about Koulsy Lamko gives a specific example of a writer in another literary form who is celebrated beyond his national context.

steps.title: Reject faulty joins
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice between independent clauses. Choice C uses and, which weakens the example relationship and still creates an awkward join. Choice D gives no boundary at all. The answer is B.
